questions.question: What 60's TV show starred Robert Culp and Bill Cosby as U.S. intelligence agents posing as a tennis pro and his trainer, the first TV show to feature a black actor?
In the 1950s and 60s, actress Aylene Lewis portrayed this iconic woman at a Disneyland restaurant bearing the character's name, and serving her pancakes.
Name three of the five members of the Rat Pack.
questions.answer: Frank Sinatra, Dean Martin, Sammy Davis Jr., Peter Lawford, Joey Bishop

questions.question: In 1965, where did six days of violent confrontations end with 34 dead, over 1,000 injured, and entire neighborhoods burned to the ground?
What famous CBS Evening News anchor signed-off each night with, "And that's the way it is"?
